title: Gamification-Engine: EXP-Trigger, Badge-Check, Level-Up
description: EXP-Trigger in approve_review(+50,+20 Clean-Run), merge_skill(+30), create_wiki_article(+15), merge_guard(+30), create_decision_record(+10). Anti-Spam 1x/Entity. Badge-Check gegen badge_definitions. Level-Up gegen level_thresholds. SSE-Events. GET /api/users/me/achievements.
